privileged_info_summary: The volleyball standings task uses synthetic data with 8 teams (Spikers United, Net Results, Block Party, Set Point, Volley Llamas, Serve-ivors, Dig Deep, Bump & Run) generated in CSV format. The scoring rule is 3 points per win and 1 point per loss. Win percentage is calculated as Wins/(Wins+Losses). Teams are expected to be sorted by points descending (primary) and win percentage descending (secondary). Expected final standings: (1) Block Party 22pts/0.875%, (2) Spikers United 20pts/0.75%, (3) Serve-ivors 20pts/0.75%, (4) Net Results 18pts/0.625%, (5) Bump & Run 18pts/0.625%, (6) Set Point 16pts/0.5%, (7) Volley Llamas 14pts/0.375%, (8) Dig Deep 12pts/0.25%. Task has 180-second timeout and 15-step limit.
